burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; high per-case morbidity if untreated
burden.mortalityRate: Low with treatment; higher in adrenal crisis

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Low morning cortisol with elevated ACTH (primary) or low ACTH (secondary); ACTH stimulation test

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with replacement therapy and education

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Dynamic testing available in endocrine centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Glucocorticoid replacement, mineralocorticoid if primary; stress dosing education
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Adherence to stress dosing and crisis prevention
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong endocrine services and access to replacement therapy
